<?php /** * This file is part of the Nette Framework (https://nette.org) * Copyright (c) 2004 David Grudl (https://davidgrudl.com) */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace Nette\Schema; use Nette; /** * Validation error. */ class ValidationException extends Nette\InvalidStateException { /** @var Message[] */ private array $messages; /** * @param Message[] $messages */ public function __construct(?string $message, array $messages = []) { parent::__construct($message ?: $messages[0]->toString()); $this->messages = $messages; } /** * @return string[] */ public function getMessages(): array { $res = []; foreach ($this->messages as $message) { $res[] = $message->toString(); } return $res; } /** * @return Message[] */ public function getMessageObjects(): array { return $this->messages; } }
